org.docgene.api

Interface APIOutputTypes

  • All Superinterfaces:
    OutputType

    public interface APIOutputTypes
extends OutputType
    The wiki output types, including those from the plugins.
    Since:
    1.6

      static java.lang.String DOCX
      The DOCX output type.
